payload.answer: I can’t remember everything about AI as a memory item. Please provide specific facts, preferences, projects, or instructions related to AI that you want saved.

entity_resolution.reason: The request is too broad and does not provide specific, durable personal facts, preferences, or user-relevant information to store.

details: No memory was stored because the request was overly broad and not suitable as durable personal memory.

repair_options: Specify a particular AI-related preference to remember.
Provide a durable fact about your AI work, interests, or projects.
Ask to remember a concise summary of a specific AI topic.
